creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gavin Atkinson from comment #3)
> This isn't about individual preferences, this is the defaults that need
> changing, as it also affects assignees such as freebsd-doc@ which can't
> really change preferences.
> 
> Right now, the amount of email generated is insane.

Can you define a set pf sane settings? I'll check for a way to squeeze them into Bugzilla then.
